'''latama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iynx|iynx]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iynx|iynx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| latama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætæmæth|lætæmæth]] || [[word:lætæmæj|lætæmæj]] || [[word:lætæmæsh|lætæmæsh]] || [[word:lætæmæ|lætæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:latatamath|latatamath]] || [[word:latatamaj|latatamaj]] || [[word:latatamash|latatamash]] || [[word:latatama|latatama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:latamath|latamath]] || [[word:latamaj|latamaj]] || [[word:latamash|latamash]] || [[word:latama|latama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:latafmath|latafmath]] || [[word:latafmaj|latafmaj]] || [[word:latafmash|latafmash]] || [[word:latafmaf|latafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latamatha|latamatha]] || [[word:latamaja|latamaja]] || [[word:latamasha|latamasha]] || [[word:latamaka|latamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latamath|latamath]] || [[word:latamaj|latamaj]] || [[word:latamash|latamash]] || [[word:latama|latama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latamathal|latamathal]] || [[word:latamajal|latamajal]] || [[word:latamashal|latamashal]] || [[word:latamakal|latamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latamathatha|latamathatha]] || [[word:latamajaja|latamajaja]] || [[word:latamashasha|latamashasha]] || [[word:latamaka|latamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latamathan|latamathan]] || [[word:latamajan|latamajan]] || [[word:latamashan|latamashan]] || [[word:latamakan|latamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latamathaoro|latamathaoro]] || [[word:latamajaoro|latamajaoro]] || [[word:latamashaoro|latamashaoro]] || [[word:latamakaoro|latamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
